steps.title: Complete the square
steps.content: This is an equation-only circle problem. Complete the square for the $x$-terms and $y$-terms to put the equation into standard circle form, then read the radius from $r^2$.

steps.title: Complete the square for x and y
Compute the requested value
steps.content: Square side $= 2r = 18$, so perimeter $= 4 \times 18 = 72$. That confirms C is correct.
